ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Season 7) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Pyxanovia Pixies) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA, WNBA) */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., 'completed', 'scheduled') */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the position belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Whether this is the player's primary position */,
  "secondary_position" INTEGER /* Whether this is the player's secondary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season combination */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "regular_season_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the regular season */,
  "playoff_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the playoffs */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_teams" (
  "game_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-team combination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the game */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Whether the team is the home team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_teams_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., 'login', 'logout') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
